name: Caramel Apple Pecan Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 McIntosh apples; peeled/cored and thinly sliced (1 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Place one round of pastry into a 9-inch pie pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine apples, pecans, sugar, caramels, flour, and milk. Spoon the mixture into the pie shell.
4. Top with the remaining pastry. Fold the edge of the top pastry under the bottom pastry. Pinch together and flute the edge with a fork. Cut several slits in the top to allow steam to escape during baking. Brush the top with milk and sprinkle with sugar.
5. Bake until the crust is golden brown, about 45 minutes. The pie is best served slightly warm.
